case_title: STATE OF CALIFORNIA, EMPLOYMENT DEVELOPMENT DEPT. vs. MARTIN, MILTON

docket_entries.description: UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT, IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MARTIN, MILTON $3,288.28 PRINCIPAL, $98.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,386.28
